textPlain: Really cool, although Connecticut is the last place in the US I'd make a destination to go hiking to. But I see how it's a good place to create a dashboard for, as it contains NO National Forests, NO National Parks[0], No BLM, and only 2300 acres of Wilderness (which this counter dashboard doesn't monitor), so it's much easier to put all these counters in (and the appropriate maintenance)[0] (basically)
